title: Map Transform
description: Use the .map method to transform an array of numbers into an array of their squares.
problemStatement:
Transformation! Given an array `nums = [1, 2, 3]`, use the `.map` method to return a new array where each number is squared. Print the final array.

**Requirement:** Use the `puts` method to display the result.
hints: `.map` returns a new collection and is one of the most used methods in Ruby.
